description:
Advances: specled.realized_by

Deliverable:
Add SpecLedEx.Realization.EffectiveBinding.expand_implications/1 — pure idempotent function on a binding map (string-keyed tier => list of MFA-or-bare-module strings). For every entry under 'implementation', ensure the same entry appears in 'api_boundary' (deduplicated, sorted lexicographically). Other tiers untouched. Implementation is one-way; api_boundary-only entries do NOT seed implementation. Idempotent.

Verification:
- Tests to pass: effective_binding_test.exs covers idempotency, one-way semantics, dedup, sort, empty-input branches, both-tiers populated case, other-tiers-untouched.
- Behaviors to demonstrate: spec requirements specled.realized_by.implication_one_way and specled.realized_by.implication_invoked_per_layer (the 'invoked per-layer' part is verified at S5).

Out of Scope (files):
- lib/specled_ex/realization/orchestrator.ex (S5)
- lib/specled_ex/realization/canonical.ex (S3)
- lib/specled_ex/realization/api_boundary.ex (S4)
- lib/specled_ex/realization/implementation.ex (S4/S5)
- .spec/**
Allowed touches:
- lib/specled_ex/realization/effective_binding.ex
- test/specled_ex/realization/effective_binding_test.exs

Out of Scope (intent):
- Do NOT modify for_requirement/2's signature or behavior.
- The orchestrator wiring of expand_implications is S5's job, not this stage's.
- No detector wiring; no orchestrator wiring.

Merge gate:
- [ ] Code compiles cleanly
- [ ] Tests listed above pass
- [ ] Spec verification passes
- [ ] Scope check: diff touches only Allowed globs (mechanical)
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE comment on the ticket
title: S2: EffectiveBinding.expand_implications/1
